title: Wild Planet
description: Adds various animals that aren't found in other mods.
body:
Wild Planet is a mod that adds in 106 animals mostly not found in any other mods. It also adds in 10 species of plants and fungi. This mod somewhat functions in survival mode, but is primarily intended for Creative Mode.

# Animals Added by this Mod:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Bushpig (Potamochoerus larvatus)
- Invisible Rail (Gallirallus wallacii)
- Crested Partridge (Rollulus rouloul)
- Western Weka (Gallirallus australis australis)
- Pygmy Hog (Porcula salvania)
- Fernandina Island Giant Tortoise (Chelonoidis niger phantasticus)
- Great Curassow (Crax rubra)
- Red-Billed Curassow (Crax blumenbachii)
- Black Guan (Chamaepetes unicolor)
- Horned Guan (Oreophasis derbianus)
- Red Triangle Slug (Triboniophorus graeffei)
- Kagu (Rhynochetos jubatus)
- Giant Coua (Coua gigas)
- Coastal Suni (Nesotragus moschatus moschatus)
- Red-Billed Ground Cuckoo (Neomorphus pucheranii)
- Rufous-Winged Ground Cuckoo (Neomorphus rufipennis)
- Short-Eared Dog (Atelocynus microtis)
- Storm's Stork (Ciconia stormi)
- White Stork (Ciconia ciconia)
- Maguari Stork (Ciconia maguari)
- Black Stork (Ciconia nigra)

- Crimson-Headed Partridge (Haematortyx sanguiniceps)

- Jungle Bush Quail (Perdicula asiatica)
- Slaty-Masked Tinamou (Tinamus resonans)

- Purple Finch (Haemorhous purpureus)

- Red-Throated Parrotfinch (Erythrura psittacea)

- Chattering Kingfisher (Todiramphus tutus)
- Long-Tailed Koel (Urodynamis taitensis)

</details>

# Plants and Fungi Added by this Mod:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Big Puma Fungus (Austroomphaliaster nahuelbutensis)
- Gamba Grass (Andropogon gayanus)
- Philippine Ground Orchid (Spathoglottis plicata)
- Asian Bleeding Heart (Lamprocapnos spectabilis)
- Cogon Grass (Imperata cylindrica)
- Bleeding Tooth Fungus (Hydnellum peckii)
- Fire Heath (Erica cerinthoides)
- Smooth Blood Lily (Haemanthus sanguineus)
- Hare's Tail Grass (Lagurus ovatus)
- Lion's Mane (Leonotis leonurus)

</details>
